name: typo3-project-upgrade
description: Skill for upgrading deployed TYPO3 project instances across major LTS versions

skills.name: typo3-project-upgrade
skills.description: Use when upgrading a deployed TYPO3 project/instance to a new LTS version — migrating site configuration, TypoScript, templates, Docker infrastructure, and database. Not for extension code upgrades (use typo3-extension-upgrade instead).
